subject: HTTPS calls for sdc
commit_message:
HTTPS calls for sdc

Proper configuration for HTTPS in the sdc:
-configure the livenessProbe/readinessProbe ports
-change mount path for dcea-be components
-update dcea component images

Signed-off-by: Krystian Kedron <k.kedron@partner.samsung.com>
